summary: Hunt Laravel specific vulnerabilities — Debug mode leakage (APP_DEBUG=true exposes full stack trace + env vars), Laravel Telescope/Horizon dashboard unauthorized access, Ignition RCE (CVE-2021-3129),
preconditions: Skill hunt-laravel has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching hunt-laravel
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097
